content.en:
4x4 Half Centers Method

Introduction

This method is pretty useful when at least two half centers (bars) exist.

Make Three Half Centers

After finishing three cross edges for Yau method, make three half centers (different colors),

then put them in the left side on the front, bottom and back faces.

Solve Bottom Center

Solve Front Center

From now on, use only Rw and U moves to solve centers. You can also solve back centers first.

Solve Back Center

After this step, the last centers will be automatically solved.
